# Graffito Source Material — Vendored Copy

Vendored: 2026-03-22
Origin: /Users/daviddickinson/Projects/Lora/ComfyPromptByAPI/SourceMaterial/Contexts/Graffito/

These are read-only copies of the key Graffito creative source files,
vendored into latent-dreamer so prompts and research can reference
them without cross-repo dependencies.

Canonical source remains in ComfyPromptByAPI. If the script or notes
are updated there, re-copy here.

## Files

| File | Origin |
|------|--------|
| script.md | Script/script.md — V10, Mark Friedberg |
| shots.md | Script/shots.md — V9, shot-by-shot plan |
| mark-scenes2_and_3.md | Mark/scenes2_and_3.md — Mark's scene intent |
| mark-scenes3_and_4.md | Mark/scenes3_and_4.md — Mark's scene intent |
| feedback-08-18-25.md | Feedback/D_Notes/08-18-25.md — session notes |
| feedback-08-23-25.md | Feedback/D_Notes/08-23-25.md — session notes |
| feedback-08-31-25.md | Feedback/D_Notes/08-31-25.md — session notes |
| readme-context-guide.md | README.md — project context guide |
